tasks.intent:
EXTRACT BOAT LISTING DATA WITH PHONE NUMBER

WHAT TO CLICK:
- Listing title text: boat year, make, model text BELOW the boat photo (NOT the photo itself)
- Text appears as blue clickable link under the large boat image
- Usually formatted like '2018 Sea Ray 350 SLX' or similar year/make/model

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Large boat photos (rectangular images taking up 70% of listing card)
- Heart outline icons (top-right corner of photos)
- Blue 'Featured' labels (top-left corner of photos)
- Social media icons in footer (circular white symbols on dark background)
- Photo gallery navigation (arrows, dots, thumbnails)
- Dealer website links or logos
- 'Contact Dealer' buttons (we want private sellers only)

STEPS:
1. Identify listing cards with boat photos and text below
2. Click on the blue text link showing boat year/make/model BELOW the photo
3. Wait for listing detail page to load
4. scroll(direction='down', amount=3) to see full listing content
5. Look for phone numbers in these patterns: (555)555-5555, 555-555-5555, or 10+ consecutive digits
6. IGNORE these numbers: years (4 digits), prices ($xx,xxx), zip codes (5 digits), model numbers
7. scroll(direction='down', amount=3) to read Description and More Details sections
8. If phone number found, extract: year, make, model, price, boat type, seller phone, seller name (or 'Unknown')
9. Read current URL from address bar for listing URL
10. key_press(keys='alt+left') to return to search results
11. done(success=true, summary='EXTRACTED | Year: [year] | Make: [make] | Model: [model] | Price: [price] | Type: [type] | Phone: [phone] | Seller: [name] | URL: [url]')
12. If no phone found: key_press(keys='alt+left'), done(success=false, summary='SKIPPED | No valid phone number found')

ERROR HANDLERS:
- If photo gallery opens (fullscreen image with '1 of N'): key_press(keys='Escape'), key_press(keys='alt+left')
- If 404 page (yellow warning triangle): key_press(keys='alt+left'), done(success=false, summary='SKIPPED | 404 not found')
- If off-site redirect (URL not boattrader.com): key_press(keys='alt+left') immediately
- If dealer page (not private seller): key_press(keys='alt+left'), done(success=false, summary='SKIPPED | Dealer listing')

OUTPUT FORMAT:
done(success=true, summary='EXTRACTED | Year: 2018 | Make: Sea Ray | Model: 350 SLX | Price: $45000 | Type: Cruiser | Phone: (555)123-4567 | Seller: John Smith | URL: https://www.boattrader.com/boat/2018-sea-ray-350-slx-12345')

loop.pagination_intent: Click 'Next' button or page number to advance to next page of results. Look for pagination controls at bottom of listing cards. If no next page available, stop iteration.
